settings.review_text: Our guide was incredibly professional and thoughtful throughout the journey. The pace felt comfortable, everything was well coordinated, and the whole experience felt smooth and personal.

settings.heading: What Guests Loved About This Trip
settings.subheading: Verified feedback from travelers who experienced this itinerary with Lynxtour.
settings.summary_keywords: Most mentioned: guide, pacing, comfort, flexibility
settings.highlight_1_text: Booking and coordination felt easy, clear, and responsive.
settings.highlight_2_text: Guests appreciated helpful, knowledgeable local guidance throughout the trip.
settings.highlight_3_text: The itinerary felt balanced and enjoyable without being rushed.
settings.highlight_4_text: Travelers liked the freedom to adjust timing, stops, and trip flow.
settings.cta_text: Private journeys designed with real care, local insight, and flexible service from start to finish.

settings.brand_desc: Providing private, bespoke travel services that delve deep into the soul of Yunnan.
